name: Modal
description: Modal (functional root: open/onClose, Escape-to-close, overlay-click-to-close, body-scroll lock), ModalOverlay (backdrop), ModalHeader (Basic/Left-Icon/Error/Warning/Success/Information x Medium/Small), ModalFooter (Basic/Stretch/Checkbox/Information/Toggle/Stepper/Link Button), and StatusModal (composed alert dialog: icon+title+description, Horizontal/Vertical alignment, 4 status types).
sourceNote: Modal/ModalOverlay were built as genuinely functional (Escape key, overlay click, body-scroll lock while open) rather than static markup, matching this project's precedent (DatePicker, ColorPicker). ModalFooter shares DrawerFooter's exact structure/button sizing plus an added 'information' type (Figma's custom info-custom-fill icon was substituted with RemixIcon's information-fill, per the RemixIcon-only policy). ModalHeader's Medium-size icon circle reuses the KeyIcon component directly (identical 40px/padding-10/icon-20 proportions); StatusModal's icon box uses its own radius-10 square (not KeyIcon's radius-full circle), matching the source design exactly.
